); export default function EnhancedLoadsPage() { const [loads, setLoads] = useState(initialLoads); const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false); const [form, setForm] = useState(emptyForm()); const [loadFilter, setLoadFilter] = useState("All"); const [search, setSearch] = useState(""); // Memoized Stats for the Header const stats = useMemo(() => { const total = loads.reduce((sum, l) => sum + parseFloat(l.rate.replace(/[$,]/g, "") || 0), 0); const active = loads.filter(l => l.status !== "Delivered").length; return { total, active }; }, [loads]); return (
